segments.text: Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ, to them that have obtained like precious faith with us through the righteousness of God and our Saviour Jesus Christ
Grace and peace be multiplied unto you through the knowledge of God, and of Jesus our Lord
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: According as his divine power hath given unto us
all things that pertain unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises: that by these ye might be partakers of the divine nature, having escaped the corruption that is in the world through lust
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: And beside this, giving all diligence, add to your faith virtue; and to virtue knowledge
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: And to knowledge temperance; and to temperance patience; and to patience godliness
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: And to godliness brotherly kindness; and to brotherly kindness charity
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: For if these things be in you, and abound, they make you that ye shall neither be barren nor unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: But he that lacketh these things is blind, and cannot see afar off, and hath forgotten that he was purged from his old sins
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Wherefore the rather, brethren, give diligence to make your calling and election sure: for if ye do these things, ye shall never fall
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: For so an entrance shall be ministered unto you abundantly into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Yea, I think it meet, as long as I am in this tabernacle, to stir you up by putting you in remembrance
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Knowing that shortly I must put off this my tabernacle, even as our Lord Jesus Christ hath shewed me
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Moreover I will endeavour that ye may be able after my decease to have these things always in remembrance
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: For we have not followed cunningly devised fables, when we made known unto you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but were eyewitnesses of his majesty
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased
segments.speaker: God the Father

segments.text: For he received from God the Father honour and glory, when there came such a voice to him from the excellent glory
And this voice which came from heaven we heard, when we were with him in the holy mount
We have also a more sure word of prophecy; whereunto ye do well that ye take heed, as unto a light that shineth in a dark place, until the day dawn, and the day star arise in your hearts
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Knowing this first, that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of God spake as they were moved by the Holy Ghost
segments.speaker: Peter
